main.description: Return the calling DID's currently-active strike state (#54). Establishes the tools.cairn.public.* namespace: ATProto service auth required, but authorization is self-identity — the verified `iss` IS the subject. There is intentionally no `subject` parameter; if you need to query someone else's state you need admin/mod role on tools.cairn.admin.getSubjectStrikes. Same wire shape as the admin endpoint via cross-namespace ref.

errors.name: SubjectNotFound
errors.description: No subject_actions row has ever been recorded for the calling DID. Same semantic as the admin endpoint.
